title.rendered: Jessica + Angus | Bill Baggs State Park Engagement

content.rendered: This cute couple, Jessica and Angus, will be tying the knot in less than one month from today! We just cannot wait. Jessica chose to bring a little bit of fall to Florida with the warm colors she wore and the pretty little boots. These two were up to anything, even getting wet in the water! We ran into a few raccoons at the Bill Baggs State Park, but we made it out alive 😉 Enjoy some of our faves from this rockin e-session!

title.rendered: Veronica + Lazaro | Jungle Island Wedding

content.rendered: We love unique weddings and shooting in new locations. I mean, it’s not every day you get to shoot with Miami’s best of the tropical and a jungle at the same time. You might be wondering, well, where DID you shoot their wedding at? At the amazing Jungle Island! I’m sure you remember Veronica and Lazaro from their very unique Wynwood engagement session, especially the bouncy car. Their wedding was no different: full of style, originality and life. We truly had a great time and were thrilled to be a part of your big day. Enjoy some of the best from that day. Congrats again guys on your marriage!

Stephanie + Salehin | Coral Gables Engagement

content.rendered: This was our first time meeting this adorable couple, Stephanie and Salehin. Stephanie was referred to us by her cousin, which happens to be one of our awesome clients that recently got married. We love keeping it all in the family 😉 This lovely couple will be tying the knot next May and we truly can’t wait til then. Stephanie and Salehin chose Coral Gables for their engagement session since they also wanted to bring their little 4-legged-daughter, Sophia, along. We had an amazing time shooting them and just love their chemistry. Enjoy some of our favorites from this e-sesh:

title.rendered: Justina + Nathan | Eden Regal Ballroom Wedding

content.rendered: On this beautiful day,  Justina and Nate chose the Hollywood Beach Marriott to get ready for their big day. Once the bride was dolled up and the groom ready to get swept off his feet, they did a quick stop at the Young Circle Park. Why so? This lovely couple did their first look with all their friends there to support them. Nate was definitely swept away by Justina’s beauty! After the first look they jumped to their wedding ceremony and then to their beautiful wedding reception at the Eden Regal Ballroom. We had such an amazing time with all the energy that Justina and Nate’s family and friends had, it was truly a memorable wedding. Great food, great party and even greater desserts! Check out some of our faves from this amazing day:

title.rendered: Jaclyn + Jared | Miami Beach Portrait Session

content.rendered: Coming all the way from Missouri, Jaclyn and Jared decided to make their trip to Florida memorable experience. How? By capturing a little bit of their Miami experience with a beautiful portrait session. They chose to work with our amazingly talented in-house photographers Vanessa & Tica and they rocked this session!  They really enjoyed shooting in the beaches of Miami, the heart of South Florida. This lovely in-love couple was just way too cute. We hope you guys get to relive your weekend getaway with this little preview. Come back to Florida soon!

title.rendered: Heather + Justin | Key West Wedding

content.rendered: Nothing more fun than destination weddings, especially when they become a mini road trip for us. We just had the most awesome time at Heather and Justin’s wedding in Key West, FL. This lovely couple tied the knot on the beach and added a little beachy touch  with the coolest, most original, bouquets. They had starfish on them! Their ceremony was at the Fort Zachary Taylor and their amazing reception took place at Kelly’s Caribbean, this wedding surely screamed out Key West. Thank you guys for the fantastic time and congrats again on your wedding! Enjoy some of our favorites:

title.rendered: Kenia + Michael | Fairchild Botanic Garden Engagement Session

content.rendered: The greatest thing about summer in South Florida has got to be the rain….NOT! Kenia and Michael, the highschool sweethearts, had to postpone their session due to the crazy rain that has been coming our way. Despite the storms,  postponing, and heat,  their engagement session was clear from ugly clouds and raindrops! The day couldn’t have been more gorgeous where they chose to do their session at the beautiful Fairchild Botanical Gardens. It was so much fun shooting these two! Not only were they high school sweethearts, but they also are currently going through their college years together in the same location. We wish the very best for the both of you and can’t wait to shoot your wedding at the end of the year! Enjoy some of the highlights from this day:

Our very own in-house photographer Tica had a blast shooting Mr. Keith, and he did bring in the heat with his amazing spices! They even ran into the Ibiza 2014 and the amazing cars. title.rendered: Bessy + Justin | Cauley Square Maternity Session

content.rendered: We started a journey with Bessy and Justin when they were only engaged. Got to experience shooting their wedding, and now, the arrival of their baby in their maternity session. What a privilege to have been able to shoot these guys 3 times in a row! They chose to do a little beachy theme in their very own backyard. Later on , we went to the Historic Village of Cauley Square in Miami to finish off. We can’t get enough of these pictures and Bessy was truly a great mommy-to-be-model in her 7 months out, pregnancy. After almost 2 years of marriage, these two look amazing! Congrats again guys on your baby, we wish you the very best on your growing family. Enjoy some of our faves!

Not only did it have some gorgeous, breathtaking views, but also, the decorating team did an outstanding job on the gorgeous, well-detailed, reception arrangements. title.rendered: Tiffany + Zach | Frenchman’s Creek Wedding

content.rendered: Tiffany and Zach had a very gorgeous, romantic wedding at the Frenchman’s Creek. Even though this beautiful wedding took only 6 weeks to plan, every detail was incredibly gorgeous from beginning to end. We had a blast with these two riding (and racing) in golf carts. Our beautiful bride not only found out the sex of the baby that she was carrying on her wedding day, but she also made a special gift for her groom… She revealed that they were having a baby girl on their big day! Later, they announced to the whole wedding guests the big news. What a touching wedding this was. We wish you both a very happy future and a lovely family! You might remember these two from their lovely Flagler Museum engagement session. Their wedding wasn’t any different, these two were born to be in the spotlight. It was such a gorgeous day at the Fort Lauderdale Hilton, right on the beach, where their getting ready and wedding reception took place. Everything was so much fun and we had a pleasure to work with Events By Vento Designs that made everything look amazing! With the two different worlds of Korea and Brazil attracting, you have the beautiful Youmee and stunning Andrè getting married. We truly enjoyed this wedding and how laid back everyone was. No matter the language, nor the culture, love always finds a way. These two are crazy for eachother, it was just so evident by the way they looked at one another. Korea and Brazil can definitely party! Enjoy some of our faves from this super awesome wedding in Coconut Grove.

They are definitely made for eachother and it really showed in the sweet wedding that they had at the Floridian Ballroom. title.rendered: Cruz Building Wedding

content.rendered:
A Wedding in Miami like no other

It’s not every day that you get to run into your past clients, we have to admit, it can be very emotional ::sniff sniff::… In this amazing Cruz Building Wedding, we ran into almost everybody that we knew, such a small world that all our clients were together in one room celebrating Melissa and Alex’s wedding! You might remember these two from their barn engagement session. They finally tied the knot and they really are true sweethearts.  Read more on their story below  👇  👇  👇

Why choose the Cruz Building Wedding as your ultimate venue

When this beautiful Cruz Building Wedding took off, in 3 floors of amazingness, the party was on!  Every single one of the guests gasped as they entered a wedding venue like they’ve never seen before.  We have to say, it was definitely a photographer’s playground, we couldn’t stop taking pictures of every little thing. The place truly speaks for itself! 

This photo was done in the second floor of the Cruz Building Wedding.  So many rich colors and details surround the dining room where the guests entered and were pampered to a fine 5-course meal.

The photo of this cake was taken at the third floor where another amazing space awaits to dance and party like never before.  The colors of the up-lights really light up the ambiance.  You can tell this Cruz Building Wedding couple spared no detail when it came to decorations.

Above is the grand ballroom of this Cruz Building Wedding.  Every single angle provides so much richness to your wedding dress and his charming looks.  Below, we captured the sunset in the balcony on the third floor, right next to the dance floor.

This was their grand entrance, entering from the second floor down to the first, where all the guests were waiting for their first dance.

As a photographer, i always enjoy being able to capture moments like these from the second floor, it just makes everything freeze around while the bride & groom dance.  So romant

Definitely shedded some tears in this one, the father & daughter dance is never easy for us.  To stay composed, while everyone around is crying and when you see daddy shed the tear for the first time.

I literally can’t get over these stairs, and brick walls.  They look so stunning!

excerpt.rendered: A Wedding in Miami like no other It’s not every day that you get to run into your past clients, we have to admit, it can be very emotional ::sniff sniff::… In this amazing Cruz Building Wedding, we ran into […]

Their wedding was held at the gorgeous Signature Grand and it was not only beautiful but very sentimental for all of us. We loved capturing every single moment, from Daddy’s first look to Jordan’s father playing a special song with his harmonica for them. Ciara. . .Jordan . . . We LOVE you guys! title.rendered: Bessy + Justin | Coral Gables Country Club Wedding

content.rendered: This bride and groom were one of a kind! Bessy and Justin tied the knot during their beautiful outdoor ceremony at the Coral Gables Country Club. They had the awesomest bridal party (and strongest too lol). The bridesmaids and groomsmen had their own little jumping contest (guess who won?). The girls proved they were the ones with the muscles when they carried Justin with their strong, working-out, arms. The white and blue’s in this wedding were amazing, they created a really nice environment. Well, not only did we get to shoot their engagement session in a golf court, but they also decided to add a little bit of golf to their wedding when they did their night shots. These two are true golfers. Bessy, Justin, you guys looked stunning! Enjoy some of our favorites:

title.rendered: Laura + Robbie | Doubletree Biscayne Bay Miami Wedding

content.rendered: Vintage weddings bring so much nostalgia.  Laura’s retro – fashion look and Robbie’s charming personality made a fantastic combination for this beautiful couple.  They said their “I do’s” overlooking the breezy Biscayne bay and the city – so romantic!  We loved being there to witness their most special day and capture all of the emotion that surrounded them.  Enjoy some of our favorites from the day!

title.rendered: Waldo + Valentina | Wynwood Art District Portrait Session

content.rendered: Winter-in-New-York, graffiti walls? Nope, just another session at the Wynwood Art District! This time no engagement, no wedding coming up, not really a special occasion…it was a just-for-fun, brother/sister (and mom) portrait session. They couldn’t have picked a better place for an International DJ and soon-to-be Forever 21 model, lol! Being our cousins we felt right at home with them and we all ended up having a blast. Enjoy some of the coolest shots of the day featuring dubstep, DJ Waldo, straight from Venezuela:

title.rendered: Jessica + Joe | Matheson Hammock Park Wedding

content.rendered: The second to last wedding of 2012…What can we say? We were extremely excited to shoot this wedding on the last weekend of the year! Jessica and Joe’s ceremony took place at the Matheson Hammock Park with the beautiful, breezy, beachy, sunny and sandy environment. They had their “first look” prior to their ceremony, and Joe could not keep his eyes off his stunning bride! We loved working with both their families, they were tons of fun. The reception took place at the Red Fish Grill, where the guests danced the night away to the breeze of the ocean. Jessica, Joe…we wish you guys the best! Please enjoy some of our favorite shots of their big day:

title.rendered: Shravani + Mohinder | Boca Beach Resort Engagement Session

content.rendered: This e-session was one of a kind, Mohinder decided to come visit Shravani before the year was over all the way across from Kansas to do their session. They picked the beautiful Boca Beach Resort to take these beautiful pictures. They will be tying the knot on February 14th all the way in India! So romantic..Even though we won’t get to travel to their wedding, our pictures will. Enjoy some of our favorites from this beautiful couple:

title.rendered: Acromatico Team | 2012 In Pictures

content.rendered: It’s hard to believe that 2012 is almost over, it’s been an amazing year! We’ve met so many awesome people in this last year and have gone through so many new awesome experiences. We can’t wait to start off next year and surprise you with so many things. Before we close off the year, we want to thank all of our new (and older) clients, we couldn’t have done this without you! The weddings, the engagement sessions, the mansion weddings, Italy sessions, all our brand new moms with their maternity sessions, even our brave underwater session volunteers! We can’t thank you enough for choosing us, it’s very hard to let go of this year, but we are extremely happy to start off a brand new year with new goodies yet to come. We’ve had many ups (we got to travel all the way across Europe!), and yes, we’ve had our downs as well: dropping lenses and breaking them, getting water in our iphone during a beach session, and we’ve had many embarrassing moments (we prefer not to disclose lol!)…but hey, we’re human, and that’s all part of the fun! We have an amazing team and each and every session we’ve done has been a blast! We also have a new member on our team: Alessandro. We are so happy you are on board, you’re the best Ale! And how we could forget Tica, the best assistant anybody could have!  To everyone who made this incredible 2012 possible, we can only say.. Thank you! Relive some of our best moments through these pictures, we love you all. Enjoy!

excerpt.rendered: It’s hard to believe that 2012 is almost over, it’s been an amazing year! We’ve met so many awesome people in this last year and have gone through so many new awesome experiences. We can’t wait to start off next […]

title.rendered: Ciara + Jordan | Wynwood Art District Session

content.rendered: This session wasn’t the typical e-session. It was a session for our good friends wedding invitation. Yes, we dedicated the whole time to get the best shots for their wedding invitation for March 2013! And they came out awesome! Ciara has been a friend of ours all our lives and we absolutely love Jordan for her. They’re made for each other! We honestly can’t wait to shoot their wedding. We took them to the art district of Wynwood to the coolest graffiti walls. Stay tuned for their e-session! We hope you enjoy some of our favorites, this couple is a blast!

content.rendered: This couple threw us back, once again, to the vintage era. You might remember Suzie and Rey from their summer engagement session at The Forge in Miami Beach. Needless to say, their wedding reflected their vintage soul. It was held at the Grand Salon Ballroom at the Killians Palm Country Club in Miami. They had a beautiful romantic ceremony in the outdoors and a blingy, all-crystalled-out, reception. We loved their wedding and awesome bridal party!  Take a look at some of our favorites from such a special day:

title.rendered: Jayson Milner Brickell Chiropractor | Commercial Photography

content.rendered: Jayson has been our favorite and highest recommended chiropractor ever! Because we’re always carrying tons of equipment and have a bunch of equipment hanging around our shoulders on every wedding, going to a chiropractor and staying healthy has been a fundamental part of our weekly routine.  When we first started treating our backs with Jayson, we immediately felt a huge difference in our bodies – our back pain gradually decreased over time.  We came in with crooked back spines and lets just say after the second x-ray checkup, we found that our backs were back to normal and couldn’t believe the major changes that went through our bodies in just 3 months!  We are so happy to see Jayson continue growing and it’s been by no accident – his success truly shows in the amazing chiropractor he is.  Congratulations on remodeling and opening the new office! Here is a sneak peek of his awesome new chiropractor office in downtown Brickell.

title.rendered: Melissa + Jose | Vizcaya Wedding

content.rendered: Vizcaya is one of our favorite places for engagement sessions. Now it became our favorite wedding spots since we got to shoot our first bride and groom there! You might remember Melissa and Jose from the “bookstore” engagement session back in May. They’re love story is unique since they are college sweethearts. It all began with a simple school project they had together and next thing you know, about 3 years later, they tied the knot! Who would’ve thought? We just love these two, they’re wedding was a blast! Enjoy some of our favorite moments from their big day:

title.rendered: Melissa + Spencer | The Addison Boca Raton Wedding

content.rendered: We shot the Wades! Well, not exactly from the Miami Heat …more like Melissa and Spencer: “The Wades”. Melissa and her girls got ready at the Boca Beach Club in Boca Raton, and she took a very special guest with her…Little Dolce, her puppy! He was ready in his tux dressed like a little groom, so cute! They were doing the “first look” at the Boca Beach Club, but Melissa wasn’t too sure she really wanted to do it, so she teased him Spencer a little longer and he had to wait for his “first look” but nothing could stop this groom-to-be from seeing his bride for the first time. Spencer walked blindfolded toward his beautiful bride-to-be, as the whole crowd awed at them. Everything turned out beautifully! Melissa was more gorgeous than ever, and their wedding was a blast. Enjoy some of our favorites:

title.rendered: Angelica + Huy | Hilton Key Largo Wedding

content.rendered: This blog screams out destination wedding! Angelica and Huy escaped the cold weather in New York to run away to the beautiful beaches in South Florida. The sunset roughly lasted 5 minutes for Angelica and Huy’s beautiful wedding in the Hilton of Key Largo, FL. Despite the short timing, they took advantage of the stunning sunset and Alessandro, once again, captured the gorgeous scenery! He never fails to amaze us! We are extremely happy to have him on our team. Great job Ale! Enjoy Huy and Angelica’s awesome wedding:

content.rendered: Janel and Esteban are by far the most photographed client’s we’ve had! From their engagement session to their after wedding session and now this just-because underwater session every time we go shooting it gets better and better, and our new underwater camera loved them! It was amazing to experience for the first time the awesomeness of shooting a couple underwater! Can’t wait to do it again! Scuba diving anyone?

We loved working with the Mondestin family and are very excited to be showing you a few of our favorites!

title.rendered: Stephanie + Danny | Hugh Taylor Birch Park Engagement

content.rendered: Everybody knows who Allie and Noah are, especially when we start talking about the Notebook. What does that have to do with today’s blog? Two words: Notebook Engagement! Stephanie and Danny picked this very romantic, just-like-the-movies, theme. When they told us, we were thrilled since it’s one of our favorite movies. Some  people find it horrible when it rains on picture day, for us, we’re glad it did…it gave the scene the last touch! This particular session was very risky, we had to jump in a canoe with them…but don’t worry, the camera’s made it safe lol. Just like the novel, their love is a tender story about the enduring power of love. We hope these pictures take you back to 1946. Enjoy some of our favorites:
